title: salix viminalis var. pubera
intro: Salix viminalis var. pubera, also known as the silver willow or hairy willow, is a variety of the willow tree, belonging to the family Salicaceae. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree with medicinal properties derived from its bark, which contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The medicinal properties of Salix viminalis var. pubera make it useful for relieving pain, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and menstrual cramps, with the health benefits including improved cardiovascular health and reduced risk of heart disease. Salix viminalis var. pubera can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
